parameters.name: economic_split
parameters.description: Fraction of economic node weight initially on v27. Extended range brackets the cascade floor (~0.50) and economic override threshold (~0.82).

parameters.name: pool_committed_split
parameters.description: Fraction of committed (non-neutral) pool hashrate on v27. Covers the Foundry flip-point (~0.214) and Phase 3 transition zone (~0.296).

parameters.name: pool_ideology_strength
parameters.description: How strongly committed pools weight ideology vs profitability. Slightly wider than prior sweeps to capture near-zero ideology behavior.

parameters.name: pool_max_loss_pct
parameters.description: Maximum revenue loss committed pools tolerate before switching forks. Brackets the full_switch threshold (~0.22) and contested zone boundary (~0.30).

parameters.name: pool_profitability_threshold
parameters.description: Minimum profit advantage required for neutral pools to consider switching. Previously confirmed non-causal on lite network (lhs_2016_6param, sep=0.011); this sweep validates on full network.

parameters.name: solo_miner_hashrate
parameters.description: Fraction of total hashrate from solo miners acting independently of pool ideology. Previously confirmed non-causal on lite network (lhs_2016_6param, sep≈0); this sweep validates on full network.
